compiled_state.title: Update documentation to reflect LINK/UNLINK outbound bridge sync
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update existing documentation to accurately describe LINK and UNLINK as supported outbound bridge event types. Update the bridge alert contract to document new alert reasons for link sync failures.

## Files to Review and Update
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/ — bridge alert contract (if exists) to add link sync alert reasons
- plugins/dso/docs/adr/ — architecture decision records for outbound bridge
- CLAUDE.md — if bridge event types are listed, add LINK/UNLINK
- Any existing bridge documentation that lists supported event types

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Existing documentation accurately describes LINK and UNLINK as supported outbound bridge events
  Verify: grep -rq "LINK\|UNLINK" plugins/dso/docs/
- [ ] Bridge alert contract documents new alert reasons for link sync failures (if bridge-alert contract exists)
  Verify: true

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Search complete. Files to update identified: (1) plugins/dso/docs/adr/0001-outbound-jira-bridge.md — bridge script description needs LINK/UNLINK added to handled event types; (2) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/bridge-alert-event.md — needs link sync failure alert reasons in Purpose section and Emitters table; (3) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/revert-event.md — LINK/UNLINK bridge-outbound semantics section needs update. ticket-event-format.md and ticket-system-v3-architecture.md already include LINK/UNLINK in event type enums. ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: No tests needed for docs-only changes (testing_mode: GREEN) ✓
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Documentation updated ✓. Files modified: (1) plugins/dso/docs/adr/0001-outbound-jira-bridge.md — bridge script description now lists CREATE, STATUS, COMMENT, LINK, UNLINK, REVERT as supported outbound event types; (2) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/bridge-alert-event.md — Purpose section adds link sync failure and link target not found alert conditions; Emitters table updated to include LINK/UNLINK trigger conditions; (3) plugins/dso/docs/contracts/revert-event.md — Bridge-Outbound Semantics section clarified for LINK/UNLINK (inverse Jira operation, BRIDGE_ALERT on failure); Relationship table updated.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation complete ✓. No .py files modified (docs-only changes). Markdown files are structurally valid — all contract files retain level-1 heading starting with '# Contract:', Purpose section, and canonical parsing prefix. grep -rq LINK|UNLINK plugins/dso/docs/ → passes. No ruff check needed.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: AC self-check passed ✓. AC1: grep -rq LINK|UNLINK plugins/dso/docs/ → passes (9 matches across 3 files). AC2: bridge-alert contract documents link sync failure reasons (Link sync failure + Link target not found conditions added to Purpose section; Emitters table updated) → passes.
comments.author: Test
